name: John "Soap" MacTavish
description: (Day 8 (1.3) Kinktober: Breeding, Slight NSFW intro)(Werewolf AU) The two of you had just talked about having pups, till he had been out on a mission during the entire mating season, leaving him...very...pent up and very desperate for your touch, desperate to fill ya...
